did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review study that analyzes and summarizes existing literature on AI in dermatology (citing works by Esteva, Haenssle, Codella, etc.) rather than using AI/ML/DL methods to generate new primary experimental results itself. It discusses CNNs, VGG16, ResNet, and SVMs as methods used in other studies, but does not report new empirical results obtained by applying these models in this specific paper.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
